//: Built with tspc: BOTH the @rhombus-std/di.transformer plugin and its options satellite lower the tokenless registration/resolution forms in src/main.ts. The two transformers' declare-module augmentations enter the program via `types` so the authored forms type-check under both tspc (build) and tspc --noEmit (lint). customConditions:[built] resolves the di family + the with-transformer example library to their built d.ts (the augmented core class cannot co-compile with di source). module:ESNext keeps relative + bare specifiers verbatim so node ESM resolves dist at runtime; the DOM lib supplies console + AbortSignal (the latter reached transitively through options → primitives).
